description: The largest indoor venue on campus, used for graduation ceremonies, large lectures, and major events.

steps: Enter through the main gate and walk straight along the main road.
Keep walking past the Admin block — you will see it on your left.
Look for the large hall with the distinctive roof ahead of you on the right.
The entrance to the MPH faces the main road.
With the Sports Emporium behind you, walk toward the main road.
Turn left onto the main road.
The MPH will be visible on your left after about two minutes of walking.

description: The main sports facility on campus, housing the gym, indoor courts, and changing rooms.

steps: Enter through the main gate and follow the main road.
Take the first major turning on the left after the Admin block.
Follow that road downhill — the Sports Emporium is the large building at the bottom.
From the Commerce Building, walk toward the open field.
Cross the field heading south.
The Sports Emporium is visible at the far end of the field.

description: Houses the Faculty of Commerce, with lecture rooms and staff offices for business-related departments.

steps: Enter through the main gate and walk along the main road.
After passing the Admin block, take the path on your right.
The Commerce Building is the large rectangular building directly ahead.

description: Handles fee payments, financial clearance, and bursary queries. Located inside the Admin block.

steps: Enter through the main gate and walk straight ahead.
The Admin block is the first major building on your left — you cannot miss it.
Enter through the main Admin block doors.
Turn right inside the entrance. The Finance Office is the second door on the right, marked with a sign.

description: The university chapel, used for religious services and sometimes official ceremonies.

steps: Enter through the main gate and walk along the main road.
Pass the Admin block on your left and continue walking.
The Chapel is visible on the right side of the road — look for the cross on the building.
Stand facing the MPH entrance.
Turn right and walk along the path beside the MPH.
The Chapel is a short walk ahead, recognisable by the cross on its facade.

description: Handles student accommodation matters, hostel allocation, and residence-related complaints.

steps: Enter through the main gate and walk past the Admin block.
Take the road that leads toward the student hostels.
The Warden's Office is a smaller standalone building near the entrance to the hostel area — look for the sign above the door.

description: Provides confidential peer support and counselling services for students. Located near Lomawa hostel.

steps: Enter through the main gate and walk toward the hostel area.
Head toward Lomawa hostel — it is the hostel block on the eastern side of the residence area.
The Peer Counselling Office is in the small building directly adjacent to the Lomawa hostel entrance.
Look for the blue door with the Peer Counselling sign.
